evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2500);try{MOS.nav('catalogo')}catch(e){}await w(4500);let out={};try{MOS.abrirMembreteCard('IDPRO0002305');await w(1800);out.tieneModal=!!document.querySelector('[class*=membrete],[id*=membrete],.adhesivo-etiqueta');out.textoVisible=(document.body.innerText.match(/OLIVO DEL VALLE|Sixpack|33/g)||[]).join(',');}catch(e){out.err=String(e&&e.message||e);}window.scrollTo(0,0);return out;})()
